frictions.description: The native runner reports successful perft coverage as an aggregate `PASS: 12 perft tests passed` line and does not print per-depth node counts on success.
frictions.resolution: Mapped each assigned assertion to its corresponding expected-node array in `engine/tests/test_perft.c` before using the passing runner output as the contract result.

summary: Tested 6 assigned native perft assertions; all 6 passed via the native engine runner.
